original_image_tags: In the upper right corner of the document, there are large, handwritten initials in black ink, appearing to be "L.B.F."
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Scanned typewritten declassified memorandum page with a “CONFIDENTIAL” stamp at top and bottom, dated 10 August 1949, titled “Unidentified Flying Objects,” with a handwritten “Part 1” notation in the upper right.*
